2397750.name: The Omins
2397750.description:
The Omins have discovered mysterious portals leading to distant and unknown lands.
Each new land offers space to settle, resources to gather, and dangers waiting beyond what can be seen.
An unknown threat drives them onward, forcing them to move from portal to portal in search of a place they can finally call home.

A real-time settlement strategy game blending survival and exploration

In The Omins, you guide a small community growing and surviving in a hostile world. You decide what to build, where to explore, when to expand, and how much risk to take. Each scenario gradually uncovers new details about the nature of the Omins, their world, and the forces shaping it.

Key Features

  • You issue direct orders to your Omins: move, gather, build, and fight. Timing and tactical choices shape the success of a settlement and the outcome of each encounter.

  • The Omins are not simple units. They react to danger, flee when overwhelmed, help fallen companions, and take care of their own needs, from food to rest. Losses matter, but the community can grow and renew itself over time.

  • Every settlement begins with limited resources. You gather what you need to build homes, food and material production buildings, barracks to recruit soldiers, and towers and walls to defend the village.

  • The Omins progress through different eras, unlocking new buildings, tools, and possibilities as their journey continues.

  • Exploration plays a central role. Unexplored territories contain resources, opportunities, and threats. Venturing into them is necessary to progress, but it is not always safe. The world is covered by a fog of war that reveals new areas as they are explored and conceals them again when they are abandoned.

  • The game unfolds through structured scenarios, each with clear objectives and defined challenges. As you progress, new clues emerge about the nature of the Omins and the threats they must confront.

  • Immersion comes before heavy simulation. Interaction with the Omins and their world stays at the center, reducing micromanagement and limiting time spent in menus and interfaces.
2397750.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
